TakeOwnership.command: powershell.exe -windowstyle hidden -command "Start-Process cmd -ArgumentList '/c takeown /f \""%V"\"  /r /d Y /skipsl && icacls \""%V"\" /grant *S-1-3-4:F /t /c /l & pause' -Verb runAs"
